_meta.name: Heady Service Registry
_meta.note: NO priority/ranking. ALL services have equal status.

heady-brain.description: Central AI reasoning engine — multi-model inference with CSL-gated routing

heady-brains.description: Multi-brain federation — parallel reasoning across providers

heady-soul.description: Orchestration core — HeadySoul awareness and values layer

heady-infer.description: Inference engine — model routing, streaming, evaluation

heady-embed.description: Embedding service — multi-provider embedding with MRL truncation to 384-dim

heady-memory.description: Memory persistence — pgvector HNSW, octree spatial, episodic recall

heady-vector.description: Vector operations — CSL gates, similarity search, spatial indexing

heady-projection.description: Vector projection engine — 3D spatial computing, dynamic UI projection

heady-bee-factory.description: Dynamic bee creation — 30+ bee types, concurrent-equal spawning

heady-hive.description: Bee coordination hub — swarm management, lifecycle tracking

heady-federation.description: Agent federation — cross-swarm coordination, shared context

heady-guard.description: Security enforcement — zero-trust validation, mTLS, IP classification

heady-security.description: Security scanning — vulnerability detection, threat analysis

heady-governance.description: Policy enforcement — rulez gatekeeper, compliance validation

heady-health.description: Health monitoring — φ-interval probes, anomaly detection

heady-eval.description: Evaluation engine — Arena Mode battles, CSL scoring

heady-testing.description: Testing framework — automated verification, regression detection

heady-web.description: Web platform — micro-frontend portal with Module Federation

heady-buddy.description: Chat companion widget — persistent memory, proactive assistance

heady-ui.description: UI component library — φ-scaled design system components

heady-onboarding.description: User onboarding — guided setup, preference collection

heady-pilot-onboarding.description: Pilot program — early adopter enrollment and tracking

heady-task-browser.description: Task management UI — visual task DAG, swarm assignment

auto-success-engine.description: φ-scaled auto-success — dynamic heartbeat, CSL-discovered categories

hcfullpipeline-executor.description: 21-stage pipeline — RECON through EVOLUTION cognitive state machine

heady-cache.description: Caching layer — hot/warm/cold with φ-scaled TTLs, LRU eviction

ai-router.description: Multi-model AI routing — CSL domain-match selection, no ranking

api-gateway.description: API gateway — unified entry point, rate limiting, auth validation

model-gateway.description: Model selection gateway — capability-match routing across providers

domain-router.description: Domain-based routing — resolves all 9 sites + aliases to services

mcp-server.description: MCP protocol server — 31 registered tools, stdio+HTTP transport

google-mcp.description: Google MCP integration — Vertex AI, Cloud APIs, OAuth

memory-mcp.description: Memory MCP server — vector memory tools for external agents

perplexity-mcp.description: Perplexity MCP — Sonar Pro research with citation injection

jules-mcp.description: Jules MCP — Google Jules AI agent integration

huggingface-gateway.description: HuggingFace integration — model hub, inference API, datasets

colab-gateway.description: Colab integration — GPU burst compute, notebook execution

silicon-bridge.description: Silicon computing bridge — hardware acceleration routing

discord-bot.description: Discord bot — community interaction, notifications, commands

heady-vinci.description: Pattern learning engine — recognition, clustering, prediction

heady-autobiographer.description: Auto-documentation — narrative event logging, system story generation

heady-midi.description: MIDI/creative interface — music generation, event bus, Ableton integration

budget-tracker.description: Cost tracking — φ-scaled budget routing, provider cost monitoring

cli-service.description: CLI interface — interactive command-line with OAuth, themed output

secret-gateway.description: Secret management — 1Password integration, rotation, vault sync
